common.clerkDisabled: Social sign-in (Google, Apple) — configure Clerk to enable

athlete.metaDescription: Access your athlete portal — registrations, results, and events.
athlete.subtitleIdentify: Passwordless access — code via email in seconds.
athlete.subtitleEmailOnly: Passwordless access — we'll send a code to your email.
athlete.brandSub: Registrations, results, QR codes, and upcoming events. Everything an athlete needs in one place.
athlete.brandFooter: Your data is protected. We never share your information.
athlete.testimonial1Quote: Registering took less than a minute. My QR was ready instantly and I skipped the lines.
athlete.testimonial2Quote: Finally a platform that gets runners: results, registrations, and community in one place.
athlete.testimonial3Quote: Every race is a new chapter. Athlete Hub helps me never miss one.
athlete.otpError: We couldn't send the code. Please try again.

staff.metaDescription: Access for Athlete Hub administrators and organizers.
staff.subtitleUnified: Enter your work email — we'll detect your role automatically.
staff.brandSub: Registrations, payments, categories, and real-time metrics. The hub your organization needs.
staff.testimonial1Quote: We went from spreadsheets to a real ops hub. Registrations and payments just flow.
staff.testimonial2Quote: The panel gives us full visibility: categories, capacity, revenue — all in real time.

dashboard.quote2: The finish line starts with a single step.

results.title: Your results

placeholder.eventsDesc: Create, publish, and manage events from one place.
placeholder.registrationsDesc: View bib numbers, payments, and participant check-in.

meta.title: Sports Events & Athlete Community
meta.description: Discover and register for triathlons, marathons, and trail races across Mexico and Latin America. Join elite communities and track your athletic journey.

hero.description: Compete in world-class events across Mexico and Latin America. Join elite communities, track your progress, and unlock performance insights.

stats.title: The Heartbeat of AthleteHub
stats.subtitle: Real-time insights into our global sports community

featured.title: Featured Events
featured.subtitle: Curated competitions across Mexico and beyond

communities.title: Join Your Tribe
communities.subtitle: Connect with like-minded athletes and build lasting momentum

challenges.title: Active Challenges
challenges.subtitle: Push your limits, earn rewards, and climb the leaderboards

leaderboards.title: Global Leaderboards
leaderboards.subtitle: Compete with the world's best athletes and communities

cta.title: Ready to Level Up Your
cta.description: Join 185,000+ athletes transforming their performance with world-class events, competitive communities, and data-driven insights.

footer.tagline: The most advanced platform for athletes, communities, and sports events across Latin America.

eventsBrowse.pageSubtitle: Browse races, triathlons, and trail runs across Mexico. Filter by sport, city, date, and price — or explore on the map.
eventsBrowse.empty: No events match your filters. Try adjusting your search.

eventDetail.serviceFeeNote: Prices include a {{percent}}% platform service fee at checkout.

auth.title: Sign in to continue

auth.perk1: Your registration linked to your athlete profile
auth.perk3: Passwordless — code via email in seconds
